title: 愚公移山
meaning: 比喻做事有毅力，不怕困难，坚持到底就能成功。

scenes.title: 大山挡路
scenes.description: A vast landscape showing two huge mountains blocking the path of a small village. Yugong stands at the bottom looking up, feeling overwhelmed.
scenes.prompt: An elderly Chinese man named Yugong with long white hair and beard, wearing traditional simple hemp robes, strong facial features showing determination, warm and inviting childlike illustration style, Wide angle scene, soft watercolor texture, pastel color palette with warm earth tones, gentle lighting, clean white background, suitable for children aged 3-8, high quality, detailed but not cluttered. An elderly Chinese man named Yugong with long white hair and beard, wearing traditional simple hemp robes, strong facial features showing determination, warm and inviting childlike illustration style, standing at the foot of two massive mountains blocking his village path., Wide angle scene, Soft watercolor texture, pastel color palette with warm earth tones, gentle lighting, clean white background, suitable for children aged 3-8, high quality, detailed but not cluttered
scenes.narration:
太行王屋两座山，高高大大挡门前。
愚公一家住山下，出门走路绕远边。

scenes.title: 决心移山
scenes.description: Yugong gathers his family under a large tree. He points at the mountains with a determined expression, explaining his plan to move them.
scenes.prompt: An elderly Chinese man named Yugong with long white hair and beard, wearing traditional simple hemp robes, strong facial features showing determination, warm and inviting childlike illustration style, Medium shot, soft watercolor texture, pastel color palette with warm earth tones, gentle lighting, clean white background, suitable for children aged 3-8, high quality, detailed but not cluttered. An elderly Chinese man named Yugong with long white hair and beard, wearing traditional simple hemp robes, strong facial features showing determination, warm and inviting childlike illustration style, pointing at distant mountains while speaking to his smiling family members gathered around him., Medium shot, Soft watercolor texture, pastel color palette with warm earth tones, gentle lighting, clean white background, suitable for children aged 3-8, high quality, detailed but not cluttered
scenes.narration:
愚公说：“咱们齐心协力，把山搬走！”
家人点头齐声应，从此劳动不罢休。

scenes.title: 挥锄挖土
scenes.description: Close up of Yugong swinging a hoe into the ground. Sweat drops fly, showing hard work. The scene is bright and energetic.
scenes.prompt: An elderly Chinese man named Yugong with long white hair and beard, wearing traditional simple hemp robes, strong facial features showing determination, warm and inviting childlike illustration style, Close-up shot, soft watercolor texture, pastel color palette with warm earth tones, gentle lighting, clean white background, suitable for children aged 3-8, high quality, detailed but not cluttered. An elderly Chinese man named Yugong with long white hair and beard, wearing traditional simple hemp robes, strong facial features showing determination, warm and inviting childlike illustration style, swinging a hoe vigorously into the rocky soil, sweat drops visible, dynamic action pose., Close-up shot, Soft watercolor texture, pastel color palette with warm earth tones, gentle lighting, clean white background, suitable for children aged 3-8, high quality, detailed but not cluttered
scenes.narration:
拿起铁锤和锄头，叮叮当当声音响。
不管冬天多寒冷，不管夏天太阳烫。

scenes.title: 孩子帮忙
scenes.description: Small children carrying tiny baskets of rocks. They look happy and helpful, adding a sense of community and innocence.
scenes.prompt: An elderly Chinese man named Yugong with long white hair and beard, wearing traditional simple hemp robes, strong facial features showing determination, warm and inviting childlike illustration style, Medium shot focusing on children, soft watercolor texture, pastel color palette with warm earth tones, gentle lighting, clean white background, suitable for children aged 3-8, high quality, detailed but not cluttered. Cute little children carrying small woven baskets filled with rocks, smiling faces, wearing simple traditional clothes, walking behind the elderly Yugong., Medium shot focusing on children, Soft watercolor texture, pastel color palette with warm earth tones, gentle lighting, clean white background, suitable for children aged 3-8, high quality, detailed but not cluttered
scenes.narration:
小孩也来帮大忙，提着小筐装满石。
虽然力气比较小，一片心意暖洋洋。

scenes.title: 智叟嘲笑
scenes.description: An old man with a white beard (Zhisou) stands with arms crossed, shaking his head and laughing at Yugong. Yugong looks calm and firm.
scenes.prompt: An elderly Chinese man named Yugong with long white hair and beard, wearing traditional simple hemp robes, strong facial features showing determination, warm and inviting childlike illustration style, Two character interaction shot, soft watercolor texture, pastel color palette with warm earth tones, gentle lighting, clean white background, suitable for children aged 3-8, high quality, detailed but not cluttered. An elderly Chinese man named Yugong with long white hair and beard, wearing traditional simple hemp robes, strong facial features showing determination, warm and inviting childlike illustration style, standing calmly. Opposite him stands Zhisou, an old man with short white beard, arms crossed, shaking head with a skeptical expression., Two character interaction shot, Soft watercolor texture, pastel color palette with warm earth tones, gentle lighting, clean white background, suitable for children aged 3-8, high quality, detailed but not cluttered
scenes.narration:
有个老头叫智叟，摇头大笑说风凉：
“你这傻劲真可笑，山那么高怎么量？”

scenes.title: 愚公回答
scenes.description: Yugong speaks confidently to Zhisou. Background shows the progress made on the mountain side. Yugong's expression is wise and peaceful.
scenes.prompt: An elderly Chinese man named Yugong with long white hair and beard, wearing traditional simple hemp robes, strong facial features showing determination, warm and inviting childlike illustration style, Medium shot, soft watercolor texture, pastel color palette with warm earth tones, gentle lighting, clean white background, suitable for children aged 3-8, high quality, detailed but not cluttered. An elderly Chinese man named Yugong with long white hair and beard, wearing traditional simple hemp robes, strong facial features showing determination, warm and inviting childlike illustration style, speaking confidently with open hands, gesturing towards the partially moved mountain in the background., Medium shot, Soft watercolor texture, pastel color palette with warm earth tones, gentle lighting, clean white background, suitable for children aged 3-8, high quality, detailed but not cluttered
scenes.narration:
愚公笑笑摇摇头：“子子孙孙无穷尽！
只要坚持不放弃，大山迟早会搬平。”

scenes.title: 感动天帝
scenes.description: A dreamy scene where clouds part to reveal a majestic celestial figure (The Emperor of Heaven) looking down with admiration. Golden light shines softly.
scenes.prompt: An elderly Chinese man named Yugong with long white hair and beard, wearing traditional simple hemp robes, strong facial features showing determination, warm and inviting childlike illustration style, Low angle looking up, soft watercolor texture, pastel color palette with warm earth tones, gentle lighting, clean white background, suitable for children aged 3-8, high quality, detailed but not cluttered. Majestic celestial figure, The Emperor of Heaven, appearing in the clouds above, glowing with soft golden light, looking down with a compassionate and admiring expression towards the small figures below., Low angle looking up, Soft watercolor texture, pastel color palette with warm earth tones, gentle lighting, clean white background, suitable for children aged 3-8, high quality, detailed but not cluttered
scenes.narration:
愚公精神真伟大，感动天上老神仙。
天帝听了直称赞，决定帮忙解困难。

scenes.title: 神力搬山
scenes.description: Two giant divine beings lift the massive mountains easily. Yugong and his family watch from below with joy and relief. The sky is blue and clear.
scenes.prompt: An elderly Chinese man named Yugong with long white hair and beard, wearing traditional simple hemp robes, strong facial features showing determination, warm and inviting childlike illustration style, Wide angle scene, soft watercolor texture, pastel color palette with warm earth tones, gentle lighting, clean white background, suitable for children aged 3-8, high quality, detailed but not cluttered. Bright blue sky above., Wide angle scene, Soft watercolor texture, pastel color palette with warm earth tones, gentle lighting, clean white background, suitable for children aged 3-8, high quality, detailed but not cluttered
scenes.narration:
天神派来大力士，一肩扛起一座山。
太行王屋不见了，大路通通达四方。

scenes.title: 幸福家园
scenes.description: A beautiful view of the village with open roads and green fields. Yugong sits peacefully watching the sunset. The atmosphere is serene and happy.

scenes.narration:
路通了，心宽了，日子过得真香甜。
只要有恒心，奇迹就在你身边。
